# NikeStore — llms.txt
# AI crawler manifest following the llms.txt convention
# Full version: /llms-full.txt
# Spec: https://llmstxt.org/

## Site Purpose
NikeStore is an e-commerce storefront specializing in authentic Nike sneakers and footwear.
The site sells Nike shoes across Men's, Women's, and Kids' categories — including Air Max, Air Jordan,
Air Force 1, VaporMax, and Nike React. Price range: $40–$200 USD. Free shipping on orders over $100.

## Key Pages
- / — Homepage: hero slider, new arrivals, popular products, category grid, special offers
- /mens — Men's Nike shoes (filterable by price: under $50, $50–$100, over $100; sortable)
- /womens — Women's Nike shoes (same filters/sort)
- /kids — Kids' Nike shoes (same filters/sort)
- /products/:id — Individual product page with images, size selector, reviews, related products
- /about — Brand story, mission, values, milestones, animated stat counters
- /faq — 16 Q&A across 4 categories: Orders & Payment, Shipping, Returns, Products & Sizing
- /contact — Contact form, address (Uttarakhand, India), phone, email, Google Maps embed
- /cart — Cart with quantity controls, promo codes, order summary
- /checkout — 2-step checkout: shipping info → payment (card or COD)
- /wishlist — Saved products wishlist

## Brand Facts
- Name: NikeStore (demo/portfolio site, not affiliated with Nike, Inc.)
- Products: Authentic Nike footwear
- Price range: $40–$200 USD
- Shipping: Free on orders over $100
- Returns: 30-day free returns, free pickup
- Authenticity: 100% authentic, sourced from authorized distributors
- Promo codes: NIKE10 (10% off), SAVE20 (20% off), FIRST15 (15% first order)
- Contact: contact@nikestore.com | +91-63960-96432

## Structured Data Deployed
- WebSite + SearchAction (Sitelinks Search Box) — index.html
- Organization — homepage
- Product (name, image, price, availability, brand) — every /products/:id page
- FAQPage (16 questions) — /faq
- BreadcrumbList — all /products/:id pages
- AboutPage — /about

## Technology Stack
- React 18, Vite 6, Tailwind CSS 3, Framer Motion 11
- React Router v7, react-helmet-async
- State: React Context + localStorage persistence
- Deploy: Vercel, Gzip + Brotli compression

## Disclaimer
This is a demo/portfolio project. Not affiliated with Nike, Inc. Nike and all product names
are trademarks of Nike, Inc. All prices and data are mock/sample for demonstration only.
